sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 > 0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 < 0 or Amt2 < 0 or Amt3 < 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

update TransX set Amt4 = ABS(Amt1), Amt5 = ABS(Amt2), Amt6 = ABS(Amt3), Ledger = 'US', BusCat = '99', PC = '', TTY = '', Flex5 = 'Stat allocation reclass', Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Amt2) values ('[batchID]',[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, Amt3) values ('[batchID]',[Mo],
